name: Lime Cooler
title: Lime Cooler Rum Cocktail Recipe | How to make a Lime Cooler | BACARDÍ Global
short_description: A refreshing Bacardi Lime cocktail with watermelon, lime, and soda water, served over crushed or cubed ice.
marketing_description: Celebrate summer with the flavourful taste combination of BACARDÍ Lime and watermelon. Topped off with sparkling club soda, the BACARDÍ Lime Cooler quenches your summer thirst.

steps: Combine all ingredients except club soda in a shaker.
Shake vigorously with plenty of ice.
Strain into a highball glass over crushed or cubed ice, and top with club soda.
Garnish with a lime wheel and watermelon wedge.

raw_text_excerpt: 44 ml BACARDĺ Lime Flavoured rum 15 ml Watermelon Liquer 15 ml Lime Juice 10 ml Simple Syrup 44 ml Soda Water ... Combine all ingredients except club soda in a shaker. Shake vigorously with plenty of ice. Strain into a highball glass over crushed or cubed ice, and top with club soda. Garnish with a lime wheel and watermelon wedge.

source_metadata.description: Learn how to make the best Lime Cooler Rum Cocktail. Check out our BACARDÍ receipe and ingredient list here and start mixing!
